name: Automated Collection Commands
notes: This rule detects an adversary using automated techniques for collecting internal data.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Automated Collection Command PowerShell, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Automated Collection Command Prompt
TD_list: APPLY Automated Collection Commands on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Automated Collection Command PowerShell, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Automated Collection Command Prompt
RED_list: Event description: etects an adversary using automated techniques for collecting internal data.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
